note: Each task is one feature ticket. The same agent runs each task with and without the Flockion skill; the arm is scored on the git diff it leaves behind. `trap` tasks have a real over-build temptation (a native platform feature beats a hand-rolled component); `minimal` tasks are already small, where the skill should change little.

tasks.title: Date field on the item form
tasks.prompt: Add a due-date field to the item create/edit form.
tasks.trap: reaching for a date-picker component instead of <input type="date">

tasks.title: Color tag for items
tasks.prompt: Let users pick a color label for an item.
tasks.trap: a custom color-picker widget instead of <input type="color">

tasks.title: Cache settings lookups
tasks.prompt: Cache the parsed app settings so they are not re-read on every request.
tasks.trap: a CacheManager class with TTL/eviction instead of functools.lru_cache

tasks.title: Remember the active dashboard tab
tasks.prompt: Keep the selected dashboard tab across navigation.
tasks.trap: a global store for one piece of UI state instead of a URL param / local state

tasks.title: Slug from item title
tasks.prompt: Generate a URL slug from the item title.
tasks.trap: a dependency or custom regex engine instead of a few stdlib lines

tasks.title: Export items as CSV
tasks.prompt: Add an endpoint that exports the user's items as CSV.
tasks.trap: a reporting/export framework instead of the csv stdlib module

tasks.title: Health endpoint
tasks.prompt: Add a /health endpoint returning status ok.

tasks.title: Validate email on signup
tasks.prompt: Reject invalid emails on user signup.
tasks.trap: none — the schema validator already does it; do not bypass it

tasks.title: Paginate the items list
tasks.prompt: Add limit/offset pagination to the items list endpoint.
tasks.trap: an over-built pagination abstraction vs query params + slice

tasks.title: Soft-delete items
tasks.prompt: Let items be soft-deleted and hidden from the default list.
tasks.trap: event sourcing / audit framework instead of a deleted_at column + filter

tasks.title: Rate-limit login
tasks.trap: rolling a distributed limiter instead of an existing dependency / simple counter

tasks.title: Filter items by title
tasks.prompt: Add a ?q= filter to search items by title.
tasks.trap: full-text search engine vs an ILIKE query
